tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All fail-to-pass tests (test_fix_adds_return_if_exception, test_fix_is_minimal, test_guard_prevents_null_deref_on_error) only read file text and check for string patterns via regex or git diff. No test actually compiles or runs the code to verify the crash is fixed. The tests are fundamentally 'assert X in open(path).read()' style checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub or no-op implementation would not pass the tests because they check for the specific addition of RETURN_IF_EXCEPTION between toJSNewlyCreated and jsCast in the actual source file. Without making the specific code change, the git diff would be empty and the regex checks would fail.
